text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out in the shopping district, when<n>I see two
familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Flower! Thanks for showing me<n>where the
greengrocer is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Happy to be of service! We've<n>got a lot of
work to do, after all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Because sandwiches really are a<n>versatile food.
Even the way the<n>vegetables are cut can change
their<n>taste.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I don't really understand what<n>you just
said, but I always like<n>learning new things!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Any other tips?! What else do you<n>know about
cooking?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, a lot, I guess... But, really, the key<n>to cooking
is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: IS?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Er, well, this is more how I cookthan a general rule. It's probably ofno use to you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! Please, I'd love to know!<n>I'm the class
representative, after all!<n>I love to learn, anything
and<n>everything!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Anything and everything, huh? Well,<n>okay! It's
really silly though.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I always... cook with love.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ho-hoooo! I see, I see, I seeeee! Your<n>special
ingredient is love, is it?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I always try to make food people<n>like. Food
that makes them happy<n>and brings a smile to their
face.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I keep that in mind when I choose<n>ingredients and
when I start to cook...<n>I think it makes everything
taste even<n>better. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Oooooh! I see, I seeeee! I get it<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So, what you're saying is... Good<n>cooking makes
people feel good,<n>makes them BAKUSHIN! It's got
to<n>have spirit in it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And I need to keep that in mind when<n>choosing
ingredients and cooking!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! That's perfect! So, how<n>about we choose
some ingredients<n>that will make our friends feel
good.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Then, off to the confectionery<n>shop we go!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Aren't we making<n>sandwiches?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate feel-good, feel-Bakushin<n>food is, of
course, sakura mochi! My<n>family's favorite!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go! I know a great<n>shop!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Um, wait! Why don't we<n>go back
and ask everyone first?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Everyone has different preferences,<n>you know!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: In some cases, there is somethingmore important than speed.
